sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in source material

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Power System
special_mechanics.description: Cycling weapon power levels from 0 to 3, can be toggled via debug functions. Weapons reset to lowest level after password usage.

special_mechanics.name: Invulnerability Toggle
special_mechanics.description: Debug function allows invulnerability mode during gameplay

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: Only debug/development information and gameplay mechanics documented. No physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, speeds) are available in source material. Game is a standard NES platformer from 1992 by TOSE.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Toxic Crusaders (NES)
